en_title: Xbox Reportedly Planning 'Significant' Layoffs, Budget Cuts for Marketing, and More
cn_title: Xbox计划大规模裁员并削减营销预算
subtitle: 艰难抉择
opus_summary: 据彭博社报道，Xbox CEO阿莎·夏尔玛计划进行重大裁员和预算削减，包括7月裁员、削减营销开支等。夏尔玛在内部备忘录中承认收入下滑不可持续，并指出硬件组件危机和过度扩张问题。

paragraphs.en: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma has outlined plans to "reset" the business amidst reports of "significant" layoffs and budget cuts, according to a report Bloomberg published earlier today.
paragraphs.cn: 据彭博社今日早些时候报道，Xbox CEOAsha Sharma已制定计划，在传出「重大」裁员和预算削减的消息之际「重置」业务。

paragraphs.en: The story says Xbox will be undergoing layoffs in July alongside slashes to marketing budgets and other areas of the business. Bloomberg also reported that Sharma pulled a trailer for Halo: Campaign Evolved from PlayStation's latest State of Play , potentially damaging relations between Xbox and Sony. Some had speculated that this may have been the case, as a recent trailer for the game had a disclaimer noting that footage was captured on PS5 Pro .
paragraphs.cn: 报道称，Xbox将于7月进行裁员，同时削减营销预算及其他业务领域开支。彭博社还报道，夏尔玛撤回了《光环：战役进化》在PlayStation最新State of Play上的预告片，这可能损害Xbox与索尼的关系。此前已有猜测认为情况可能如此，因为该游戏最近一支预告片附有免责声明，注明画面是在PS5 Pro上录制的。

paragraphs.en: Following Bloomberg's report, Xbox released Sharma's internal memo to the public , which features some brutal and transparent thoughts about the future of Xbox. The memo noted that this level of transparency is important going forward: "We won’t succeed by hiding hard truths, nor will we succeed by doing the same thing and expecting different results," Sharma wrote.
paragraphs.cn: 彭博社报道后，Xbox向公众公开了夏尔玛的内部备忘录，其中包含对Xbox未来一些残酷而坦诚的思考。备忘录指出，这种透明度对未来至关重要：「我们无法通过隐瞒残酷真相来取得成功，也无法通过重复同样的事情却期待不同结果来取得成功，」夏尔玛写道。

paragraphs.en: The memo outlined five "realities" about the state of Xbox, covering a notable decline in revenue that "cannot continue," a hardware component crisis, and a reset/reassessment of Xbox's portfolio and infrastructure.
paragraphs.cn: 备忘录概述了关于Xbox现状的五个「现实」，包括「不可持续」的收入显著下滑、硬件组件危机，以及对Xbox产品组合和基础设施的重置/重新评估。

paragraphs.en: “We expanded our studio system when we needed a pipeline of content to meet multiple strategies across subscription, streaming and devices,” she wrote. “In the process, we have found ourselves over extended as we executed on changing strategies in a landscape of more readily available content. We are the fortunate stewards of industry-defining franchises that have enormous potential and player demand, but we have not adequately funded them to compete and win. At the same time, as we saw this past weekend at Showcase, a reliable pipeline of first- and third-party exclusives and new IP are critical to our success. We need to reassess the balance between these and our investment priorities for the next 5 years.”
paragraphs.cn: 「当我们需要内容管线来满足订阅、流媒体和设备等多重战略时，我们扩大了工作室体系，」她写道。「在这个过程中，我们发现自己过度扩张，因为我们在内容更容易获取的环境下执行不断变化的战略。我们是行业定义级IP的幸运管理者，这些IP拥有巨大潜力和玩家需求，但我们没有给予足够的资金支持来竞争和取胜。同时，正如上周末在Showcase上所见，可靠的第一方和第三方独占作品及新IP管线对我们的成功至关重要。我们需要重新评估这些方面与未来五年投资重点之间的平衡。」

paragraphs.en: The Verge reported that sources have suggested Xbox's cuts could lead to a studio closure or changes to the Xbox studio lineup. Sharma's predecessor, Phil Spencer, had to shut down a number of Xbox-owned studios before the end of his tenure. One of the most notable casualties was The Initiative, a new studio that was tasked with rebooting Perfect Dark.
paragraphs.cn: The Verge报道称，消息人士透露Xbox的削减可能导致工作室关闭或Xbox工作室阵容调整。夏尔玛的前任菲尔·斯宾塞在任期结束前不得不关闭多家Xbox旗下工作室。其中最引人注目的牺牲品之一是The Initiative，这家新工作室曾负责重启《完美黑暗》。

paragraphs.en: Sharma also noted that Microsoft had to spend twice as much as it did on console storage components since last fall, and that number is expected to grow to five times as much as they plan for the next console, Project Helix. Her comments come just days after Xbox's Chief Strategy Officer, Matthew Ball — who joined the company not even a full month ago — noted that they were unable to keep up with demand for new consoles due to the component crisis. He also stated that it was forcing a rethink on how they approach Helix.
paragraphs.cn: 夏尔玛还指出，自去年秋季以来，微软在主机存储组件上的支出已翻倍，而随着下一代主机Project Helix的规划，这一数字预计将增至五倍。就在她发表此番言论的几天前，Xbox首席战略官Matthew Ball——入职尚不满一个月——表示，由于组件危机，他们无法满足新主机的需求。他还表示，这迫使他们重新思考如何推进Helix项目。

paragraphs.en: All of this news comes after Xbox's big showcase event, which reaffirmed a commitment to exclusivity on a case-by-case basis . This will begin with Gears of War: E-Day, which was originally in development for PlayStation 5 . Sharma, however, reportedly made the decision to scrap the PS5 version, according to Bloomberg.
paragraphs.cn: 所有这些消息都发生在Xbox大型展示活动之后，该活动重申了逐案评估独占性的承诺。首先涉及的是《战争机器：事变日》，该作最初是为PS5开发的。然而据彭博社报道，夏尔玛决定取消PS5版本。

paragraphs.en: Xbox has only committed to two major exclusives at the moment, with Sharma noting that they will continue to evaluate exclusivity as the company becomes healthier .
paragraphs.cn: Xbox目前仅承诺了两款主要独占作品，夏尔玛表示，随着公司状况好转，他们将继续评估独占策略。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等所有娱乐内容。你可以在X上关注他 @Cade_Onder。
